items.name: Classic After the Flash Goggles [Black]
items.description:
I was making the CDF goggles when I realized that they'd look very good with a standard black visor, since there's not many post-apocalyptic goggles on the catalog right now.

Yellow version: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/12201700658/
Gas mask: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/12175754596/
